title: Better CVC
description: A Better Cops vs Crims Pack for Hypixel
body:
Do `/resourcebook` in-game and click `Always open the book` to prevent the server resource pack from being force downloaded automatically.

Changes the CVC Item models to look way better than they do now. Adds 3D models for items rather than plain 2D ones.

Done:
- Shotgun (Shellshot) Item
- Sniper (Snipescope) Item
- SMG (Spraywild) Item
- Carbine (Tactile Blaster) Item
- Pistol ('Lil Blast) Item
- Original Knife Item Skin
- Auto Shotgun (Auto Shellshot) Item
- Magnum (Magnum 'Lil Blast) Item
- Bullpup (Bullspray) Item
- Handgun (Unstable 'Lil Blast) Item
- Scoped Rifle (Scoped Blaster) Item
- Rifle (Blaster) Item
- Blocks (crates)
- New Sniper Zoom Overlay
- Grenade Item models
- C4 Item Model
- SMG (Spraywild) Item Skin

Fixed:
- Paintings (Yes, they all work now.)

### ISSUES:
## THIS PACK NO LONGER WILL WORK WITH ANY OTHER RESOURCE PACKS THAT EDIT THE ENTITY.FSH CORE SHADER FILE! THAT IS NECESSARY FOR THE PAINTINGS TO FUNCTION

Next Plans:
- More Item Skins




My Kofi: https://ko-fi.com/starlightsoul
